ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES product_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who rated the product */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (0-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review comments by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_ratings_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer with the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
column_names: Current stock quantity of the product
ID of the customer who made the order
Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered)
ID of the order the item belongs to
Quantity of the product in the order
ID of the product being rated
ID of the customer who rated the product
ID of the customer with the role
Permissions for the role (e.g., read, write, delete)
